subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Beauty of the All-Bountiful! If thou wouldst partake of the boundless favors of the Lord which encompass His friends and loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بجمال منان اگر از الطاف بی پایان یزدان که شامل حال دوستان و عاشقان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @The Holy Spirit
